name: Lemmings
description:
Lemmings is a puzzle-strategy game where the player must guide a group of creatures, known as Lemmings, through a hazardous environment to a designated exit. Each level presents a unique terrain riddled with obstacles like cliffs, walls, and bodies of water. The Lemmings mindlessly walk forward in a single file until they encounter an obstacle or reach the exit. 

The core gameplay revolves around assigning specific skills to individual Lemmings to overcome these obstacles and pave the way for the rest of the group. These skills include, but aren't limited to, digging through terrain, building bridges over gaps, bashing through walls, blocking other lemmings, climbing, and falling with a parachute. A crucial element is the limited number of each skill available per level. The player must carefully manage these resources to guide a specific percentage of Lemmings safely to the exit before a timer runs out. Failure to do so results in the loss of that level. The lemmings can either be saved or 'nuked'. Nuking results in the detonation of all remaining lemmings.

controls.arrow_up: Increase release rate of Lemmings (more Lemmings appear quicker).
controls.arrow_down: Decrease release rate of Lemmings (less Lemmings appear slower).
controls.arrow_left: Scroll the game screen to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Scroll the game screen to the right.
controls.w: Assign the 'Climber' skill to the selected Lemming.
controls.a: Assign the 'Floater' skill to the selected Lemming (parachute).
controls.s: Assign the 'Bomber' skill to the selected Lemming (self-destruct after a timer).
controls.d: Assign the 'Blocker' skill to the selected Lemming (stops other lemmings).
controls.q: Assign the 'Builder' skill to the selected Lemming (builds a stairway).
controls.e: Assign the 'Basher' skill to the selected Lemming (digs horizontally).
controls.z: Assign the 'Miner' skill to the selected Lemming (digs diagonally downwards).
controls.x: Assign the 'Digger' skill to the selected Lemming (digs vertically downwards).
controls.c: Nuke all remaining Lemmings on the screen.
